specimen.title: Internationalized Routing
specimen.description: This page is rendered using server-side JSON dictionaries. No client-side i18n libraries were used.

features.middleware: Middleware detects your preferred language from the Accept-Language header.
features.dynamic_routes: Dynamic [locale] segments handle the routing structure.
features.server_components: Server Components fetch ONLY the required dictionary, reducing bundle size.
features.zero_js: Zero client-side JavaScript is required for the initial translation.
